assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain: ## Repository (e.g., task-1 line 3: 'trustify-backend'), ## Target Branch (e.g., task-1 line 6: 'main'), ## Description (present in all), at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create (task-1 has both; task-2 has Files to Modify only; tasks 3-6 all have at least one), ## Implementation Notes (present in all), ## Acceptance Criteria (present in all with checkbox items), ## Test Requirements (present in all with checkbox items).

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md, task-6-threshold-query-param.md. 6 is within [3, 10].
All 6 task files contain '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 4, task-2 line 4, task-3 line 4, task-4 line 4, task-5 line 4, task-6 line 4.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: no dependencies. Task 2: depends on Task 1. Task 3: depends on Task 1, Task 2. Task 4: depends on Task 3. Task 5: depends on Task 3. Task 6: depends on Task 3, Task 5. This forms a valid DAG: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5} and 3,5 -> 6. No cycles exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: Creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (parent dir exists in repo structure), modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (exists). Task 2: modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (exists). Task 3: creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (parent dir exists), modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (exists). Task 4: modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (exists). Task 5: modifies tests/api/sbom.rs (exists). Task 6: modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (created in Task 3) and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (exists). All paths are consistent with the repo-backend.md directory tree.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact map in impact-map.md lists 7 concrete changes: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields: critical, high, medium, low, total', 'Add advisory_summary method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table, joins to the advisory table, deduplicates by advisory ID, and groups counts by severity', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler...', 'Register the new endpoint route in the SBOM endpoints module with 5-minute tower-http cache configuration', 'Add cache invalidation hook in the advisory ingestion pipeline...', 'Support optional ?threshold=critical query parameter...', 'Add integration tests for the new endpoint covering: successful aggregation, 404 for missing SBOM, deduplication of advisories, cache behavior, and threshold filtering'. All entries specify concrete operations, specific file structures, field names, paths, and technical details.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have a ## Repository section containing exactly one repository name: 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain: ## Target Branch (all set to 'main'), ## Description (detailed descriptions present), ## Acceptance Criteria (with checkbox items), ## Test Requirements (with checkbox items). Verified in task-1 through task-6.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 6, task-2 line 6, task-3 line 6, task-4 line 6, task-5 line 6, task-6 line 6.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: None of the 6 task files or any other file in the outputs directory contains any reference to 'sha256', 'digest', '[sdlc-workflow]', or any hash values. There are no digest comment files or logs in the outputs directory. The only files present are impact-map.md and the 6 task description files. No evidence of description digest comments being posted.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: None of the 6 task files contain convention applicability rationale in the prescribed format 'Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'. The Implementation Notes sections reference docs/constraints.md (e.g., 'Per docs/constraints.md Section 5 (Code Change Rules)') but do not reference CONVENTIONS.md conventions with applicability rationale. No task contains the prescribed 'Applies:' format. Convention-aware enrichment with applicability validation is absent from all outputs.
